# Polaris Documentation

> User and developer documentation for Polaris, the pETH-powered yield layer for DeFi. Issue pAssets backed entirely by onchain collateral and yield. No T-bills. No CEXs. No compromises.

## Agent Guidance

- Start with [Launch Status](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/launch-status) for what is live, supported, or production-final.
- Treat [Public Testnet 1](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/resources/testnet) as the source of truth for Sepolia network, parameter, and contract-address values.
- Public Testnet 1 assets are Sepolia test assets with no monetary value, no production redemption, and no mainnet claim.
- Do not infer production addresses, production constants, audit status, or launch status from testnet values.
- Prefer the Markdown URLs in this file for retrieval, and cite the canonical URL shown beside each page.

## Machine-readable artifacts

- [Complete docs bundle](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-full.txt): Full sanitized Markdown for every public docs page.
- [JSON docs index](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-index.json): Routes, canonical URLs, Markdown URLs, sections, keywords, and freshness metadata.
- [Polaris testnet manifest](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/polaris-testnet-manifest.json): Machine-readable Public Testnet 1 environment, parameters, contracts, and warnings.
- [Well-known llms.txt mirror](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/.well-known/llms.txt): Alternate discovery path for the docs index.
- [Well-known full bundle mirror](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/.well-known/llms-full.txt): Alternate discovery path for the full Markdown bundle.
- [Introduction section bundle](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-sections/introduction.txt): Focused Markdown bundle for this documentation section.
- [Launch Status section bundle](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-sections/launch-status.txt): Focused Markdown bundle for this documentation section.
- [Public Testnet Quickstart section bundle](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-sections/quickstart.txt): Focused Markdown bundle for this documentation section.
- [Use Polaris section bundle](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-sections/using-app.txt): Focused Markdown bundle for this documentation section.
- [Troubleshooting section bundle](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-sections/troubleshooting.txt): Focused Markdown bundle for this documentation section.
- [Understand Polaris section bundle](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-sections/understand-polaris.txt): Focused Markdown bundle for this documentation section.
- [Reference section bundle](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-sections/resources.txt): Focused Markdown bundle for this documentation section.

## Introduction

- [Polaris](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/index.md): Polaris is a DeFi yield layer built around pETH, a yield-bearing collateral asset purposefully designed to back Polaris stablecoins and other synthetic assets. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/

## Launch Status

- [Polaris Launch Status](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/launch-status.md): Current Polaris phase, official app URL, supported network, production status, and what is safe to use today. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/launch-status

## Public Testnet Quickstart

- [Public Testnet Quickstart](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/quickstart.md): The fastest safe path to try Polaris on Public Testnet 1 with Sepolia test assets. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/quickstart

## Use Polaris

- [Dashboard](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app.md): How to read the Polaris app Dashboard and start your first testnet action. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app
- [Advanced Tools In The Polaris App](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/advanced.md): How to use the Polaris Advanced tab for PSM issue/redeem, pETH-to-POLAR conversion, and the testnet faucet. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/advanced
- [Earn In The Polaris App](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/earn.md): How to use Earn Vaults, vpETH rewards, and claim rewards in the Polaris app. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/earn
- [Issue In The Polaris App](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/issue.md): How to open and manage Polaris positions from the app Issue tab. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/issue
- [Split In The Polaris App](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/split.md): How to split pETH into fpETH and vpETH, merge them back, and avoid common execution mistakes. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/split
- [Swap In The Polaris App](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/swap.md): How to buy and sell pETH on the bonding curve with quote, approval, and slippage checks. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/swap
- [Zap In The Polaris App](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/zap.md): How to use Polaris Zap strategies and recover safely when one bundled step fails. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/zap

## Troubleshooting

- [Troubleshooting](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/troubleshooting.md): Fix common Polaris app issues on Public Testnet 1. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/troubleshooting

## Understand Polaris

- [Issuing pAssets](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting.md): How Polaris users issue pAssets directly from the protocol against pETH collateral. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting
- [Polaris Interest Rates](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/interest-rates.md): How Polaris uses issuance and redemption activity to set autonomous pAsset interest rates. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/interest-rates
- [Launch A pAsset](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/launch-a-passet.md): How external builders can deploy pAsset markets, align with Polaris through Flows, and build new markets on shared pETH collateral. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/launch-a-passet
- [Manage A Position](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/manage-position.md): Manage a Polaris position around LTV, interest, issuance, redemptions, repayment, and liquidation risk. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/manage-position
- [Polaris Asset Catalog](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/passet-catalog.md): What pAssets are, how they differ from pETH, which markets are active today, and how new pAsset markets can launch. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/passet-catalog
- [GOLDp](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/pgold.md): Polaris's gold-tracking pAsset. What GOLDp is, how it differs from centralized gold tokens, and how users can hold, issue, or earn with it. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/pgold
- [USDp](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/pusd.md): Polaris's flagship dollar-pegged pAsset. What USDp is, why hold it, and how it is created, kept on peg, and put to work. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/pusd
- [pETH Bonding Curve](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/peth.md): How pETH works as the ETH-backed reserve asset for Polaris. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/peth
- [pETH Floor Price](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/peth/floor-price.md): What the pETH floor price is, why it is designed to rise, and how the floor ratio frames downside. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/peth/floor-price
- [pETH Split: fpETH and vpETH](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/peth/split.md): How pETH splits into fpETH and vpETH, what each token represents, how merging works, and how reserve loans use fpETH. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/peth/split
- [POLAR Token, Stewardship, and Conversion](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/polar.md): Why POLAR exists, how pETH conversion creates POLAR, and how vePOLAR stewardship fits into Polaris. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/polar
- [POLAR Conversion Auctions](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/polar/conversion-auctions.md): How conversion auctions turn pETH burns into POLAR, raise the pETH floor, and route released ETH back into the system. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/polar/conversion-auctions
- [POLAR Tokenomics](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/polar/tokenomics.md): How POLAR economics work across pETH conversion, productive dilution, vePOLAR, yield routes, and pending launch terms. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/polar/tokenomics
- [Peg Defense: Issuance And Redemptions](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/redemptions-liquidations.md): How Polaris uses issuance and redemptions to help pAssets trade around their reference value. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/redemptions-liquidations
- [Polaris Liquidations](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/redemptions-liquidations/liquidations.md): How Polaris liquidates positions above maximum LTV to keep pAssets backed. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/redemptions-liquidations/liquidations
- [Recovery Mode](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/redemptions-liquidations/recovery-mode.md): How Polaris restricts risk-increasing actions when system backing becomes thin. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/redemptions-liquidations/recovery-mode
- [Polaris Stewardship, Not Governance](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/stewardship.md): Polaris keeps its core immutable and lets vePOLAR steward only bounded parameters, onboarding decisions, and edge processes that cannot be automated. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/stewardship
- [Fee Router And Flows](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/stewardship/fee-router.md): Polaris revenue routing: the Fee Router buffers protocol yield, while Flows share protocol revenue with contracts building on Polaris. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/stewardship/fee-router
- [vePOLAR Locking And Stewardship](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/stewardship/vepolar.md): vePOLAR is vote-escrowed POLAR. Lock POLAR to receive stewardship rights and a share of protocol yield without touching the immutable core. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/stewardship/vepolar
- [Why Polaris](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/why-polaris.md): Why DeFi needs immutable, counterparty-free, yield-bearing money and collateral. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/why-polaris
- [Polaris Earn Vaults](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/yield.md): Earn Vaults let pAsset holders earn from issuer interest and liquidation gains. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/yield
- [Strategies](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/yield/strategies.md): The position shapes Polaris supports, from holding pETH to issuing and hedging pAssets, described without recommendation. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/yield/strategies
- [Polaris Yield Sources](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/yield/yield-sources.md): Every source of yield on Polaris is onchain, internal to the protocol, and designed to scale with activity. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/yield/yield-sources

## Reference

- [Polaris Glossary](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/resources.md): Short definitions for Polaris terms, user-facing labels, and technical aliases. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/resources
- [Polaris Audits And Security](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/resources/audits-security.md): Polaris security model, audit-report status, bug-bounty status, and disclosure guidance. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/resources/audits-security
- [Polaris Brand Assets](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/resources/brand-assets.md): Polaris logos, the Celestial Night Sky palette, and typography, with usage guidance. Dark mode is the canonical surface. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/resources/brand-assets
- [Polaris FAQ](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/resources/faq.md): Short answers to common Polaris questions, with links to canonical pages for status, contracts, parameters, risks, and app actions. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/resources/faq
- [Polaris Risk Disclosure](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/resources/risk-disclosure.md): A catalog of the risks of using Polaris, each paired with the mechanism that mitigates it without implying any risk is eliminated. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/resources/risk-disclosure
- [Polaris Public Testnet 1](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/resources/testnet.md): Public Testnet 1 network, manifest sources, parameters, and Sepolia contract addresses, with verification rules and production-finality status. Canonical: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/resources/testnet
